extraction_notes: Complete extraction from 147 pages including ALIASES POWER pages 125-129. Rail names verified against schematic PNGs. SPMU=U7700, MPMU=U8100, SVR AON=U5700, 5V buck=UC260 (TPS62130). Charger=U5200 (RAA009063-6).

rails.name: PPVBUS_USBC0
rails.description: USB-C VBUS port 0 — left rear USB-C main power input

rails.name: PPVBUS_USBC1
rails.description: USB-C VBUS port 1 — left front USB-C

rails.name: PPDCIN_USBC_AON
rails.description: Charger alias rail — DCIN from USB-C, feeds charger IC

rails.name: PPVBUS_USBC5
rails.description: MagSafe VBUS rail

rails.name: PPBUS_AON
rails.description: Main system power bus — feeds U5700 (SVR AON), UC260 (5V), load switches, backlight. PBUS aliases on page 125.

rails.name: PPVBAT_AON
rails.description: Battery voltage rail after charger resistance. Alias of PPVBAT_AON_CHGR_RES on page 125.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON
rails.description: 3.8V always-on master rail — input to SPMU (U7700) and MPMU (U8100). PP3V8 VMAIN aliases on page 125.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_VDDMAIN
rails.description: PP3V8_AON VDDMAIN distribution. Aliases on page 125: PP3V8_AON feeds multiple sub-rails.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_WLBT_ISNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to WiFi/BT Willamette module with current sense. Verified pg 129.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_SPKRAMP_LEFT_ISNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to left speaker amplifier with current sense. Verified pg 129.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_SPKRAMP_RIGHT_ISNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to right speaker amplifier with current sense. Verified pg 129.

rails.name: PP3V8_AON_HDMI_ISNS
rails.source: Branch of PP3V8_AON via sense resistor
rails.description: PP3V8_AON to HDMI circuit with current sense. Verified pg 129.

rails.name: PP3V8_MAME
rails.description: 3.8V awake-state rail for audio amplifiers and misc. UNREADABLE exact name on verified pages; retained pending verification.

rails.description: 5V S2-state rail (UC260 TPS62130). Verified pg 49/128.
